# 🍴 Pull Request

## What dish does this PR add or modify?

> *One PR per dish. Atomic commits. Clean kitchen.*

**Dish name:**
**Date cooked:**

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🍳 New dish (new file under `dishes/`)
- [ ] 📝 Recipe correction (ingredient quantity, timing fix)
- [ ] 💬 Feedback added
- [ ] 🔧 Structural / formatting change
- [ ] 🔥 Hotfix (something was very wrong)

---

## Recipe Checklist

- [ ] Dish file created at `dishes/YYYY-MM-DD-菜名.md`
- [ ] Entry added to `cooking-log.md` index with correct link
- [ ] All ingredient quantities are specified (no "适量" without context)
- [ ] Key tips section is filled in
- [ ] Feedback section present (can be empty if dish not yet cooked)
- [ ] Serving size is 2 people

---

## Taste Test Results

> Leave blank if dish not yet cooked. Fill in post-cook.

**Overall rating:** ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (delete as appropriate)
**Would cook again:** Yes / No / Only under duress

---

## Notes for Reviewer

> The reviewer is you, future self, reading this at 11pm wondering what to cook.

---

*This PR has been reviewed by my stomach and approved for merge.*
